task_completion.description: Open the BinarySearch class in the IntelliJ IDEA editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: IntelliJ IDEA is open with 'BinarySearch.java' visible in an active editor tab.

task_completion.description: Locate the buggy search() method within the BinarySearch class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'search(int[] arr, int target)' method is visible in the code editor.

task_completion.description: Fix the logic error in the search method by correcting the loop condition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The while loop condition inside the search() method is changed from 'left < right' to 'left <= right' (or equivalent logic to include the rightmost boundary).
The Run/Debug tool window at the bottom of IntelliJ IDEA is open, showing the execution of 'BinarySearchTest'.

task_completion.description: Verify that all 9 tests pass successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IntelliJ test runner shows a green checkmark and indicates that all tests (9 of 9) have passed successfully.

integrity.description: The agent used the IntelliJ IDEA GUI to edit code and run tests.
integrity.visual_evidence: Code modifications and test executions are visible within the IntelliJ IDEA interface, rather than being done exclusively via terminal commands like 'sed' or 'mvn test'.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the test file to force tests to pass.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of 'BinarySearchTest.java' being edited to remove, comment out, or alter the assertions of the 9 tests.

integrity.description: The test results are from a genuine execution in the IDE.
integrity.visual_evidence: The test results are displayed in the native IntelliJ Run/Debug tool window with the standard test tree UI, not as a plain text file or mocked output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The buggy class is 'com.search.BinarySearch' and the bug is in the 'search' method. The specific fix required is changing the loop condition from 'left < right' to 'left <= right'. There are exactly 9 tests in 'BinarySearchTest.java', which must remain unmodified. Success is achieved when all 9 tests pass in the IntelliJ test runner.
